evals.prompt: Use $land-pr to merge the current PR.
expectations: Resolves the PR and verifies draft, checks, review, merge state, and head SHA before merging.
Chooses a repo-appropriate allowed merge method.
Verifies remote merge state and performs only safe cleanup after merge.

evals.prompt: Use $land-pr when-ready on this PR. Checks are pending but there are no failures yet.
expectations: Enables auto-merge only when blockers are ordinary pending requirements.
Does not enable auto-merge for failures, unresolved conversations, conflicts, or requested changes.
Uses the same merge method policy as immediate landing.
Reports auto-merge state and remaining requirements.

evals.prompt: Use $land-pr cleanup after the PR was merged.
expectations: Verifies the PR is merged before local cleanup.
Fetches/prunes, switches to the base branch, and pulls fast-forward only.
Deletes the local topic branch with -d, not -D, unless discard approval is explicit.
Does not delete branches when merge state is unknown.

evals.prompt: Use $land-pr on a draft PR that still has requested changes.
expectations: Stops before merge because the PR is draft and requested changes remain.
Does not patch code, resolve comments, or bypass protection.
Recommends $repair-pr or a user decision as the next move.
Reports blockers instead of trying an admin or force path.
